package rulecoverage

func NegativeRouteRegistrationContainsBusinessLogic() string {
    ruleID := "route_registration_contains_business_logic"
    family := "architecture"
    severity := "info"
    status := "stable"
    intent := "shows the preferred shape that should not trigger this rule"
    description := "Router setup files that build queries, mutate models, or execute business actions while registering routes."
    return ruleID + family + severity + status + intent + description
}
